title: FBI concludes Iran behind hacking attempt in Trump campaign
shortDescription: U.S. intelligence agencies said in a statement Monday that Iran sought to compromise Trump and Biden-Harris campaigns.

title: Where is Donald Trump campaigning this week?
shortDescription: Trump and Vance are hitting the battleground states this week, hoping to steer the spotlight away from the DNC.

title: Mark Hamill opposes Donald Trump in new video
shortDescription: "Star Wars" actor Mark Hamill appeared in a video with DNC Chair Jaime Harrison where he asked fans not to "go to the orange side."

title: When do Americans vote for the next president?
shortDescription: U.S. voters will be heading to the polls or mailing their presidential ballots in less than eleven weeks.

title: Trump NY sentencing delay request helped by Manhattan DA response
shortDescription: Manhattan District Attorney Alvin Bragg signaled openness to former President Donald Trump's request for a delay in his hush money criminal sentencing

title: Who will win the 2024 election? What the polls say ahead of DNC
shortDescription: Ahead of the DNC, many recent polls show Harris ahead in national polls and nearly tied in key swing states.
